data.title: Migrate inline ERR log trap in review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh and 7 top-level hooks to canonical log path
data.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

## What
Migrate HOOK_ERROR_LOG assignments from legacy path to canonical path in:
- plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh (1 instance — line 32)
- plugins/dso/hooks/plan-review-gate.sh
- plugins/dso/hooks/taskoutput-block-guard.sh
- plugins/dso/hooks/track-cascade-failures.sh
- plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh
- plugins/dso/hooks/track-tool-errors.sh
- plugins/dso/hooks/review-stop-check.sh
- plugins/dso/hooks/check-validation-failures.sh

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/plan-review-gate.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/taskoutput-block-guard.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/track-cascade-failures.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/track-tool-errors.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/review-stop-check.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/check-validation-failures.sh |

## Implementation
Change every `HOOK_ERROR_LOG="$HOME/.claude/hook-error-log.jsonl"` to `HOOK_ERROR_LOG="$HOME/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl"` (including `local HOOK_ERROR_LOG=` variants).

NOTE: In review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh, preserve the enforcement boundary behavior — only change the HOOK_ERROR_LOG path, do NOT add source hook-error-handler.sh (the enforcement boundary check prohibits this).

Add assertions to tests/hooks/test-hook-inline-trap-consolidation.sh verifying all 8 files use the canonical path.
